/** * @fileoverview Rule to flag use of with statement * @author Nicholas C. Zakas */ "use strict"; //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // Rule Definition //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ /** @type {import('../types').Rule.RuleModule} */ module.exports = { meta: { type: "suggestion", docs: { description: "Disallow `with` statements", recommended: true, url: "https://eslint.org/docs/latest/rules/no-with", }, schema: [], messages: { unexpectedWith: "Unexpected use of 'with' statement.", }, }, create(context) { return { WithStatement(node) { context.report({ node, messageId: "unexpectedWith" }); }, }; }, };
